ticket.subject: Issue with Order ID 6836 Not Displaying
ticket.raw_subject: Issue with Order ID 6836 Not Displaying
ticket.description:
Dear PH Multicarrier Support Team,

I hope you are doing well.

I am writing to report an issue regarding my order with Order ID 6836. Unfortunately, the order is not being displayed on the platform, and I am unable to access its details.

I kindly request you to look into this matter and assist me in resolving the issue at the earliest. Please let me know if any additional information is required from my end.

comments.body:
Hello Team,

Good Day!

We attempted to request collaborator access to your store, but it appears that the request was declined.
Could you please grant access to support@pluginhive.com from your Shopify admin so that we can check this further?

Once access is granted, please let us know, and we will proceed with the investigation.

Awaiting your response.

Thanks and Regards,
Priyanka
Team PluginHive
